retrieved_result: How the Indivisible Movement is Fueling Resistance to Trump (Photo by Karin Kamp) After the 26-page Indivisible Guide was put online as a Google doc in mid-December, it quickly went viral — former US Labor Secretary Robert Reich and actor/activist George Takei tweeted it — and Google’s servers kept crashing, rendering it virtually useless. RELATED: Activism
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses political activism rather than integrated development environments or software development topics.
